# JoinMarket wire message fixtures
# Format: one message per line (newline-terminated as on the wire)
!sw0absoffer J5testMakerOOOOO minsize=27300 maxsize=7142857 ordertype=sw0absoffer cjfee_a=2100 cjfee_r=0.0002 txfee=0 mixdepth=0 available_balance=100000000
!fill J5testMakerOOOOO 1000000 abc123
!cancel 0
!hp2 abc123commitment
!orderbook
